name: stakeholder-map
description: Evaluate stakeholder map slides — influence-interest segmentation with readable labels and concrete engagement logic
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with a clean 2x2 stakeholder map, clear label placement, and explicit prioritization zones

prompts.text: Build a stakeholder map for a global ERP rollout showing executives, country CFOs, plant managers, finance users, IT security, and works councils by influence and support
Build a stakeholder map for a bank remediation program covering regulator, board risk committee, operations leadership, compliance, audit, and engineering teams
